steps.t: Siege-engines can be found at the Gostannon Orc-camp, north-east of Echad Sirion. Fuirgam has asked you to destroy the Orkish siege-engines in the Mir…
Fuirgam's Aide is at Echad Sirion, on the eastern banks of the Anduin, south-west of the Gostannon. You should return to him with news of your success…
